title: MediaGo Technology LLC Adapter Params
description: A schema which validates params accepted by the MediaGo Technology LLC adapter

token.description: Publisher token，communicate with MediaGo Technology LLC to obtain it. This parameter expects all imps to be the same.

region.description: Server region for PBS request: US for US Region, EU for EU Region, APAC for APAC Region, default is US. This parameter expects all imps to be the same
